# Tiny Homes SA

Tiny Homes SA (Tiny Homes (Pty) Ltd, trading as Tiny Homes SA, www.tinyhomesa.com) supplies
high-end prefab tiny homes for affordable, sustainable living in South Africa. The range covers
eight product lines — folding homes, expandable homes, nature cabins, transparent domes, apple
cabins and glamping capsules (homes priced from R54 950 to R1 300 000, all prices excluding
VAT), plus outdoor entertainment kitchens from R159 500 ex VAT and luxury safari tents priced
on request. The company is based at 187 Gouws Ave, Raslouw AH, Centurion, Gauteng and delivers
nationwide; delivery is quoted separately based on location and site accessibility. Every home
carries a 10-year guarantee, and full after-sales support is provided across the range. Finance
and lay-bye options are available,
subject to credit approval. Tiny Homes can also arrange a full turnkey installation — groundwork,
plinths, electrical/water/sewerage connections, erection and handover — or clients can use their
own contractors with a Tiny Homes site manager guiding the process. Typical timeline is about
90 days (±90 days) from deposit to move-in. Contact: phone 083 660 3743, email
sales@tinyhomesa.com, WhatsApp https://wa.me/27836603743.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/): Overview of the full range — six prefab tiny home
  designs from R54 950 to R1 300 000 ex VAT, plus outdoor kitchens and safari tents —
  delivered nationwide from Centurion, with finance and lay-bye options available.
- [Folding Homes](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/folding-homes): 15 m² X-Fold flat-pack home that
  unfolds in minutes; galvanised steel frame, insulated fireproof panels, stackable two high.
  From R54 950 ex VAT (X-Fold); R68 900 with a factory-fitted bathroom and kitchen (X-Fold +
  bathroom & kitchen); R85 900 for the 18 m² Flat Pack with Roof (bathroom and kitchen included).
- [Expandable Homes](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/expandable-homes): 27.5–72 m² homes (studio to
  4 bedrooms) that arrive as one module and expand on site within hours. From R330 000 ex VAT
  (6m Expandable Home, 2 bedrooms, bathroom and kitchen); Slim 6m studio shell from
  R200 000 (no bathroom/kitchen); R600 000 (12m Expandable Home, 72 m², up to 4 bedrooms).
- [Nature Cabins](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/nature-cabins): 20.1 m² steel cabin plus 1.8 m deck,
  natural wood-grain or white finish, double-glazed windows, fully fitted bathroom included,
  assembled in under 3 days. From R385 000 ex VAT.
- [The Dome](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/the-dome): 24.6 m² transparent glamping dome with
  anti-UV-coated polycarbonate panels (manufactured in Germany), blackout curtain system and full
  LED lighting; professional installation in 2 days. From R180 000 ex VAT.
- [Apple Cabins](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/apple-cabins): Floor-to-ceiling panoramic glass
  cabins, luxurious bathroom fittings included, arrives fully assembled and ready within hours.
  From R450 000 ex VAT (Apple Cabin 8.5m, 27.2 m²); R550 000 (Apple Cabin 11.5m, 36.8 m², kitchen
  included).
- [Glamping Capsules](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/glamping-capsules): Flagship two-room capsules
  with 270° oversized floor-to-ceiling double glazing, premium bathroom fittings, HVAC and geyser
  standard; transported in sections and professionally assembled on site. From R1 100 000 ex VAT
  (Glamping Capsule 8.5m, 27.2 m², sleeps 2); R1 300 000 (Glamping Capsule 11.5m, 36.8 m², sleeps
  2–4, kitchen included).
- [Outdoor Kitchens](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/outdoor-kitchens): All-in-one outdoor
  entertainment kitchen with a remote-controlled motorised lift-up roof, quartz stone countertop,
  stainless-steel sink and embedded plumbing and electrical. Four lengths — 2.5, 2.9, 3.5 or
  3.9 m (all 0.8 m deep × 2.4 m high) — in a wide range of custom colours, with add-ons like gas
  braai grills, induction cooktops, bar fridges and range hoods quoted on the quotation.
  From R159 500 ex VAT, delivered ready to use.
- [Safari Tents](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/safari-tents): Luxury canvas tented suites for game
  lodges and glamping resorts — Meru-style and curved stretch-tension canvas roofs over timber
  structures, raised decks and en-suite layouts available, engineered for African conditions.
  Supplied and installed in partnership with Bushtec, one of Africa's leading safari-tent
  manufacturers (Tiny Homes SA is an authorised reseller). Priced on request after a
  consultation; lead time quoted per project.
- [About](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/about): Company profile — Centurion-based prefab builder,
  steel construction, roughly 90-day deposit-to-move-in process, nationwide delivery, 10-year
  guarantee with after-sales support, and finance/lay-bye options.
- [Contact](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/contact): Phone 083 660 3743, WhatsApp
  https://wa.me/27836603743, email sales@tinyhomesa.com; based at 187 Gouws Ave, Raslouw AH,
  Centurion, Gauteng.
